stories.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
stories.summary: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, its next-generation frontier model. The public rollout has been deferred as the U.S. government seeks early access, with prediction markets now pricing launch most likely in July 2026.

stories.title: DSpark: Speculative decoding accelerates LLM inference
stories.summary: DeepSeek releases DSpark, a speculative decoding framework that significantly accelerates LLM inference. The paper demonstrates major speedups for large language model serving workloads.

stories.title: Samsung readies $648 billion mega-investment in South Korea
stories.summary: Samsung is reportedly preparing a massive 1,000 trillion won ($648 billion) investment in South Korea, driven by soaring AI infrastructure and memory chip demand reshaping the country's industrial strategy.

stories.title: Qualcomm in talks to acquire AI chip designer Tenstorrent for $8-10B
stories.summary: Qualcomm is in early talks to acquire AI chip designer Tenstorrent for $8-10 billion. Led by chip veteran Jim Keller, Tenstorrent uses the open RISC-V standard and would help Qualcomm compete with Nvidia and AMD.

stories.title: Asian AI startups launch Mythos-like models as Anthropic export ban drags on
stories.summary: Asian AI startups are launching models rivaling Anthropic's Mythos as the U.S. export ban on advanced AI continues, highlighting how restrictions are spurring competition abroad.

stories.title: Anthropic claims Alibaba illicitly extracted capabilities from Claude
stories.summary: Anthropic alleges that Alibaba illicitly extracted capabilities from its Claude AI model, escalating tensions around AI model distillation and intellectual property in the global AI race.

stories.title: Google Search now entirely powered by Gemini 3.5 Flash - biggest change in 25 years
stories.summary: Google has overhauled Search so Gemini 3.5 Flash now entirely powers it, generating custom AI-summarized pages instead of traditional links - the biggest change to Search in 25 years.

stories.title: Norway imposes near-ban on AI in elementary schools
stories.summary: Norway has enacted a near-total ban on AI use in elementary schools, joining a growing list of countries imposing strict limits on AI in education for young children.

stories.title: AI learns the dark art of RFIC design
stories.summary: AI systems are now mastering radio-frequency integrated circuit design, a notoriously difficult domain. The breakthrough could dramatically accelerate chip design workflows.

stories.title: AI-designed vaccine component completes first human trials
stories.summary: The first vaccine component entirely designed by AI has successfully completed initial human trials, potentially protecting against diverse viruses and marking a milestone for AI-driven drug discovery.
